import pytest
from your_module import is_balanced_parens  # Replace with actual module name


class TestIsBalancedParens:
    """Test cases for is_balanced_parens function."""
    
    # Happy path tests
    def test_empty_string(self):
        """Test empty string returns True."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("") is True
    
    def test_single_pair_parentheses(self):
        """Test single pair of parentheses."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("()") is True
    
    def test_single_pair_brackets(self):
        """Test single pair of square brackets."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("[]") is True
    
    def test_single_pair_braces(self):
        """Test single pair of curly braces."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("{}") is True
    
    def test_multiple_same_pairs(self):
        """Test multiple pairs of same bracket type."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("()()") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("[][]") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("{}{}") is True
    
    def test_nested_same_type(self):
        """Test nested brackets of same type."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("(())") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("[[]]") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("{{}}") is True
    
    def test_mixed_balanced_brackets(self):
        """Test mixed balanced brackets."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("()[]{}") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("([{}])") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("{[()]}") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("({[]})") is True
    
    def test_complex_nested_structure(self):
        """Test complex nested structures."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("((()))") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("([{}])[()]") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("{[()()]}") is True
    
    def test_string_with_non_bracket_characters(self):
        """Test strings containing non-bracket characters (should be ignored)."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("hello") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("a(b)c") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("text[with]brackets{and}parens()") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("123") is True
        assert is_balanced_parens("!@#$%^&*") is True
    
    # Edge cases
    def test_single_opening_bracket(self):
        """Test single opening brackets."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("(") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("[") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("{") is False
    
    def test_single_closing_bracket(self):
        """Test single closing brackets."""
        assert is_balanced_parens(")") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("]") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("}") is False
    
    def test_mismatched_brackets(self):
        """Test mismatched bracket types."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("(]") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("(}") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("[)") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("[}") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("{)") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("{]") is False
    
    def test_wrong_order_brackets(self):
        """Test brackets in wrong order."""
        assert is_balanced_parens(")(") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("][") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens("}{") is False
    
    def test_unbalanced_multiple_brackets(self):
        """Test unbalanced multiple brackets."""
        assert is_balanced_parens("(()") is False
        assert is_balanced_parens
